title: ichthyothere ulei
intro: Ichthyothere ulei is a plant species found in the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the family Rutaceae and commonly known as 'Palo de la Leche' due to its milky sap. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. Ichthyothere ulei has been reported to have several health benefits, including soothing sore throats, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy among local communities. The herbal preparations of Ichthyothere ulei include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be obtained by extracting the milky sap from the plant's stem and leaves.
